name: Houdini Action: Export Alembic
description: Creates a Houdini action that exports geometry as an Alembic (.abc) cache via an Alembic ROP in /out. Provide root SOP/OBJ paths comma-separated. Chain via actions_in/actions_out into a Houdini Headless node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]
    abc_path = inputs.get('abc_path') or self.get_parameter('abc_path', '')
    root_nodes = inputs.get('root_nodes') or self.get_parameter('root_nodes', '')
    frame_start = inputs.get('frame_start')
    if frame_start is None:
        frame_start = self.get_parameter('frame_start', 1)
    frame_end = inputs.get('frame_end')
    if frame_end is None:
        frame_end = self.get_parameter('frame_end', 100)
    action = {'type': 'export_alembic', 'abc_path': abc_path, 'root_nodes': root_nodes, 'frame_start': int(frame_start), 'frame_end': int(frame_end)}
    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added export_alembic action -> {abc_path} (frames {frame_start}-{frame_end})')
    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
